channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Even Republicans are losing faith in Trump's economy
item.description: President Trump promised an economic golden age, but voters are now more pessimistic about their finances than they have been in years.

item.title: The end of the internet's golden age
item.description: Google's search overhaul this week removes one of the last remnants of the internet's golden era, when search tools felt empowering.

item.title: Exclusive: Trump says he's "50/50" on Iran deal, decision by Sunday
item.description: President Trump told Axios on Saturday he would meet with negotiators to discuss Iran's latest offer, with a decision expected by Sunday.

item.title: U.S., Iran close to a deal to end war, official says
item.description: The Trump administration and Iran are nearing a deal to end the war, with remaining differences focused on the wording of several points, a U.S. official said.
